name: ai.spala/public-mcp
title: Spala Public MCP
description: Discovery, OAuth metadata, and project MCP handoff guidance for Spala backend projects.

headers.name: Accept
headers.description: Required for raw Streamable HTTP JSON-RPC clients.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.boundary: Public MCP is for discovery, OAuth metadata, and project MCP handoff guidance. Backend changes happen on project MCP after Spala platform auth.
io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.dryRunProjectCreate: project_create is dry-run only in the current public MCP deployment.
